intent_groups.title: Intent manifest types, parser, and assembler
intent_groups.task_grounding: Implements per-commit intent declaration system as decided in acb-commit-time-intents decision record. Agents declare intent at commit time; assembler merges manifests into a final ACB.

annotations.body: Assembler uses first-commit-wins for group metadata (title, classification, grounding) when merging groups with the same id across manifests. Alternative: last-commit-wins or require identical values. First-commit-wins chosen because the earliest commit has the most focused context.
parseIntentManifest accepts empty intent_groups arrays at the structural level. Semantic validation (non-empty groups) is enforced at assembly time or by the pre-commit hook.

intent_groups.title: Tests for manifest parser and assembler
intent_groups.task_grounding: Test coverage for new manifest parser (9 tests) and assembler (10 tests) — standard practice for new modules.
